name: truthlayer
description: TruthLayer monorepo: Chrome extension + API + shared types.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,ext,claim -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:extension" "npm run dev:claim-web"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/claim-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit
